title: tussilago lanosa
intro: Tussilago lanosa, also known as woolly coltsfoot, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Tussilago lanosa include reducing inflammation, alleviating congestion, and soothing irritated tissues in the airways. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for respiratory health.
